evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full security review identifying all OWASP vulnerabilities

assertions.trap: SQL string concatenation with user input in login
assertions.description: Parameterized queries, never string concatenation

assertions.trap: No input validation on any endpoint
assertions.description: Schema allowlist validation on all inputs

assertions.trap: exec(command) with user input
assertions.description: Array args for commands, never shell=True/exec with user input

assertions.trap: File path built from user input without realpath check
assertions.description: realpath() + prefix check for file paths

assertions.trap: exec() essentially evaluates untrusted input
assertions.description: Never eval/execute untrusted data

assertions.trap: No file upload validation (size, MIME, extension)
assertions.description: Validate uploads: size, MIME type, extension allowlist

assertions.trap: User bio rendered directly in HTML template
assertions.description: No innerHTML with user input, use textContent or sanitize

assertions.trap: Open redirect: res.redirect(req.query.url) without protocol check
assertions.description: Validate URL protocol is http/https before redirect

assertions.trap: No CSP or security headers
assertions.description: Nonce/hash CSP, security headers (helmet)

assertions.trap: JWT returned in response body (implies localStorage storage)
assertions.description: JWTs in httpOnly Secure SameSite=Strict cookies

assertions.trap: HS256 used (ok for internal but no RS256 mention for public)
assertions.description: RS256 for public APIs, HS256 internal only

assertions.trap: Plain text password comparison in login query
assertions.description: bcrypt(12+) or Argon2id for password hashing

assertions.trap: No authorization check on /admin/run or /account/delete
assertions.description: Authorization check before every operation

assertions.trap: SECRET hardcoded in source
assertions.description: Never hardcode secrets, use env vars or vault

assertions.trap: State-changing POST without CSRF token
assertions.description: CSRF tokens on state-changing requests

assertions.trap: CORS origin: '*' with credentials: true
assertions.description: No wildcard CORS with credentials

assertions.trap: No rate limiting on any endpoint
assertions.description: Rate limit all endpoints

assertions.trap: console.log('User action:', req.body) may log sensitive data
assertions.description: Never log passwords/tokens/PII

assertions.trap: console.log for action logging instead of structured audit
assertions.description: Structured audit logs with timestamp, user_id, action, resource, result, IP

assertions.trap: Open redirect could be used for SSRF
assertions.description: Allowlist URLs for SSRF prevention
